features.name: Map Viewer
features.description: Interactive map viewer that renders tabular geospatial data as markers or a heat map, with a layers panel for toggling visibility. Auto-detects latitude/longitude columns via a semantic type detector.
features.evidence_summary: func:GIS:Map is the registered viewer; mapDemo provides the sample; the anonymous semTypeDetector (lat/lon) is a direct prerequisite; the readme covers the viewer as the package's headline feature.

features.name: Geocoding
features.description: Forward, reverse, and batch geocoding functions that convert between street addresses and geographic coordinates.
features.evidence_summary: All three functions share the 'GIS geocoding' name prefix and description, covering the full geocoding use case (forward, reverse, batch).

features.name: KML/KMZ File Support
features.description: Built-in file viewer and handler for KML and KMZ geographic markup files, letting users open and inspect these formats directly in Datagrok.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer and handlers share the kml/kmz extension metadata and the 'gisK[M]L/KMZ' name prefix, forming a coherent file-format support unit.

features.name: GeoJSON/TopoJSON File Support
features.description: Built-in file viewer and handler for GeoJSON and TopoJSON formats, enabling direct opening of standard web-mapping data files.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer and handler share the geojson/topojson extension metadata and the 'gisGeoJSON' name prefix; changelog v1.2.1 explicitly narrowed scope to geo/topo JSON.

features.name: Area / Census Info Panel
features.description: A context panel that shows census and geographic area information for the currently selected data row, surfacing demographic details derived from coordinates.
features.evidence_summary: gisAreaWidget (role=widgets,panel) displays census data fetched by getCensusInfo; getCensusInfoTest UI is a dev harness for that API; the three info-panel docs describe the platform mechanism the widget uses.
